title: When I set up new contacts some automatically collect emails from gmail, some do not.
excerpt: When I setting up new leads or contacts, some will automatically start brining in and tracking emails from my Gmail account, but most will not.  As far as I can tell, all the settings are the same for each lead/contact. …

posts.author: DSP (Ed Thomas)
posts.cookedHtml: When I setting up new leads or contacts, some will automatically start brining in and tracking emails from my Gmail account, but most will not. As far as I can tell, all the settings are the same for each lead/contact. What am I missing?
